Components
Name Anatomy image Component example image Figma Description Examples Type Documentation status Usage
Toggle switch Figma A toggle switch is a compact control that represents a binary choice.

Use toggles for instant settings that take effect immediately.

 Interactive control Draft

Use the Toggle switch when a user needs to switch between two states without submitting a form.

When to use

Settings panels, feature flags, and preference screens.
Slider Figma A slider lets users select a value from a continuous range. 
<Slider min={0} max={100} step={1} />
 Interactive control Draft

Use sliders for numeric ranges where precise input is less important than quick selection.
Should be skipped (empty name)
